members.name: blockLocals
members.description:
Returns the block's local context object, or nil if this frame
    is not a block activation.

members.name: call
members.description:
Returns the Call object for this frame (created during block/method
    activation), or nil if this is not a block activation frame.

members.name: depth
members.description:
Returns the number of frames from this frame to the bottom
    of the stack (inclusive). The bottom frame has depth 1.

members.name: description
members.description:
Returns a human-readable description of this frame, including
    the message name, state, and source location.

members.name: locals
members.description: Returns the locals object (sender context) for this frame.

members.name: message
members.description: Returns the Message being evaluated in this frame.

members.name: parent
members.description: Returns the parent frame, or nil if this is the bottom frame.

members.name: result
members.description: Returns the current result value of this frame, or nil.

members.name: state
members.description:
Returns the current state of this frame as a Symbol
    (e.g. "start", "activate", "if:evalBranch").

members.name: target
members.description: Returns the target (receiver) of the message in this frame.
